meaning_english: Something that is very easy to understand or do.

meaning_kannada: ನೇರ ವಿಷಯಕ್ಕೆ ಬಾರದೆ ಸುತ್ತಿ ಬಳಸಿ ಮಾತನಾಡುವುದು (Nera vishayakke barade sutti balasi matanaduvudu)
meaning_english: To avoid the main topic or not speak directly about an issue.
To intentionally ignore someone or treat them in an unfriendly way.

meaning_kannada: ಸಂಕಷ್ಟದ ರೂಪದಲ್ಲಿ ಬಂದ ಅದೃಷ್ಟ (Sankashtada rupadalli banda adrushta)
meaning_english: An apparent misfortune that eventually has good results.

meaning_kannada: ಹಳೆ ವೈಷಮ್ಯ ಮರೆತು ರಾಜಿ ಮಾಡಿಕೊಳ್ಳುವುದು (Hale vaishamya maretu raji madikolluvudu)
meaning_english: To end a conflict and become friendly again.
Feeling slightly ill or not well.

meaning_kannada: ಅತ್ಯಂತ ಪ್ರಮುಖ ಅಥವಾ ಸ್ಮರಣೀಯ ದಿನ (Atyanta pramukha athava smaraniya dina)
meaning_english: A very important or significant day.
Under all conditions, no matter how difficult they are.

word: Take it with a grain of salt
meaning_kannada: ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ನಂಬದಿರುವುದು ಅಥವಾ ಸಂಶಯದಿಂದ ನೋಡುವುದು (Sampurnavagi nambadiruvudu athava samshayadinda noduvudu)
meaning_english: To not take something too seriously or believe it completely.

meaning_kannada: ನಿಷ್ಪ್ರಯೋಜಕ ಅಥವಾ ವ್ಯರ್ಥ ಪ್ರಯತ್ನ (Nishprayojaka athava vyartha prayatna)
meaning_english: A hopeless search or a foolish, unprofitable adventure.

word: To hit the nail on the head
meaning_kannada: ನಿಖರವಾಗಿ ಸರಿಯಾದದ್ದನ್ನೇ ಹೇಳುವುದು ಅಥವಾ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Nikharavagi sariyadaddanne heluvudu athava maduvudu)
meaning_english: To do or say something exactly right.
To make a bad situation even worse.
